current_problem.description: Long chats lose continuity; new windows fail to understand project state; documentation became over-expanded and duplicated.
current_problem.immediate_priority: Stabilize machine-readable project memory before any new Tokenoskobi feature.

last_action.task: Development OS V3 sealed after helper commands push

next_safe_step.name: NEXT_WORK_UNIT_PLAN
next_safe_step.instruction: Start only an explicitly approved next work unit. Use boot_commander_v2.py and boot_health_v1.py at every new chat start.

closure_rule: No work unit is closed unless PROJECT_RUNTIME.json is updated after GitHub seal.
